meta.name: Check workflow templates against Creator Hub guidelines with Gemini and Gmail

parameters.content:
## n8n Template Approval Checker

Check your n8n workflow template against the latest official Creator Hub guidelines before submitting. This workflow fetches live approval criteria from Notion, generates a structured checklist with AI, then uploads your full workflow JSON to Gemini for a detailed pass/fail review. Results are sent to your email as an HTML report.

### How it works
1. You upload your workflow JSON file and enter the template title via the web form.
2. The workflow scrapes four official n8n Creator Hub Notion pages using the Splitbee API.
3. Gemini AI reads the scraped guidelines and generates a structured approval checklist.
4. Both the checklist and your workflow JSON are uploaded to Gemini Files API.
5. A second Gemini call reviews your workflow against every criterion and scores it.
6. The HTML review report is emailed to the address you provided.

### Setup steps
1. Add your **Google Gemini API** credential (used for criteria generation, file upload, and review).
2. Add your **Gmail OAuth2** credential (used to send the results email).
3. Activate the workflow and open the form URL to start checking templates.

## Form input
Collects the workflow JSON file, template title, and email address for results delivery.

## Scrape guidelines
Fetches four Creator Hub pages via the Notion unofficial API, then extracts readable text from each block.

## AI criteria generation
Gemini reads the scraped guidelines and outputs a numbered pass/fail checklist.

## Upload and review
Both files are uploaded to Gemini Files API, then a second Gemini call reviews the workflow against the checklist.

## Email results
The HTML review report is sent to the email address provided in the form.

parameters.formDescription: Upload your workflow JSON to check it against the latest n8n Creator Hub approval guidelines.

parameters.text:
=You are an n8n template marketplace expert.

Below are the OFFICIAL guidelines scraped from n8n's Creator Hub Notion pages:

{{ $('Extract text from Notion blocks').first().json.guidelines.substring(0, 6000) }}

Based on these official guidelines, create a STRUCTURED CHECKLIST of approval criteria.
Format it as a numbered list with clear pass/fail conditions.

Include criteria for:
1. Node count requirements
2. Integration/service requirements
3. Sticky note requirements (colors, content, placement)
4. Title format rules
5. Description requirements
6. Technical metadata (executionOrder, credentials, etc.)
7. Connection completeness
8. Common rejection reasons

Be specific with numbers and thresholds. Output ONLY the checklist, no intro text.
Respond in English.

nodes.name: Convert criteria and workflow to files
Upload files to Gemini Files API

parameters.subject: =n8n Template Review: {{ $('Submit workflow for review').first().json['Template Title'] }}
